audit_expansion: Lecture 26 uniqueness check: this record verifies that the visual ambiguity dimensions match [g,g]^0 and that adding a constant to a moment map changes values but not derivatives.

interpretation.semisimple_su2: [g,g]=g, so the annihilator is zero and the moment map is unique when it exists.
interpretation.u2_like_center: the central direction is not a commutator, so one constant shift remains invisible to Hamiltonian vector fields.
interpretation.abelian_t2: all brackets vanish, so every element of g* is an allowed constant shift.
